verdict_reasoning: KLK2 is a soluble secreted serine protease (kallikrein) synthesized with a classical signal peptide and trafficked through the ER-Golgi-secretory pathway. It has no transmembrane domain, no GPI anchor, and no documented covalent or wash-resistant tethering to a cell-surface partner. It exists in equilibrium with the extracellular soluble pool and is not anchored to the plasma membrane.
